title: Space/get N+1 query per space for members
description: space_get fetches the member list for each space in a separate SELECT inside the response loop. With N spaces, this is N+1 queries with no transaction wrapper. A concurrent Space/set (rename or member add) can commit between two get_space_members calls, so the list returned has a mix of pre- and post-mutation snapshots. Trigger: two spaces, concurrent admin update to space 2 while Space/get is iterating. Actual bad behavior: inconsistent snapshot returned to client — state token says version X but the data has mixed-version content, causing spurious JMAP synchronization loops.
